headline: UnitedHealth Bets on Profitability Over Growth: Will It Pay Off?
summary: UnitedHealth is prioritizing profitability over rapid growth as improving margins, stronger earnings and Optum expansion aim to support a long-term turnaround.

raw.headline: UnitedHealth Bets on Profitability Over Growth: Will It Pay Off?

headline: What CVS Health Stock Was Telling You About Its Three-Dollar Earnings Prize
summary: Before the stock surged, management laid out a turnaround plan for its Aetna unit that was so explicit, they practically put a price tag on it.

raw.headline: What CVS Health Stock Was Telling You About Its Three-Dollar Earnings Prize
